mapper.select: SELECT area_id AS areaId, sensor_count AS sensorCount, abnormal_sensor_count AS abnormalSensorCount, underway_task_count AS underwayTaskCount, overtime_task_count AS overtimeTaskCount, refreshed_at AS refreshedAt FROM dashboard_area_current_summary WHERE area_id = #{areaId} LIMIT 1

SELECT traffic_sum / NULLIF(sample_count, 0) AS ave_flow, pressure_sum / NULLIF(sample_count, 0) AS ave_pressure, temperature_sum / NULLIF(sample_count, 0) AS ave_temperature, shake_sum / NULLIF(sample_count, 0) AS ave_vibration, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(stat_date) * 1000 AS time FROM dashboard_area_metric_daily WHERE area_id = #{areaId}
AND stat_date >= DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(#{startTime}/1000))
AND stat_date <= DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(#{endTime}/1000))
ORDER BY stat_date
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(danger_count + critical_count), 0) FROM dashboard_area_metric_daily WHERE area_id = #{areaId} AND stat_date = CURDATE()

SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN model_name = 'dashboard_area_metric_daily' THEN refreshed_at END) AS metricRefreshedAt, MAX(CASE WHEN model_name = 'dashboard_area_current_summary' THEN refreshed_at END) AS currentRefreshedAt, MAX(CASE WHEN model_name = 'dashboard_alarm_recent' THEN refreshed_at END) AS alarmRefreshedAt FROM dashboard_read_model_refresh_state WHERE status = 'SUCCESS'
